title: フェブラリーSの後に・ツギツギ

text_block_list.text:
Success at the February Stakes marks the first win
of Smart Falcon's victory declaration.

Her smooth start causes quite a stir around her,
yet she herself is uncharacteristically coolheaded.

Our next planned race is the Teio Sho in June.
Without letting herself get carried away, Smart
Falcon focuses on her next victory.
